flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Aiken Technical College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (12.5% → 9.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Aiken Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $7.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Aiken Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Aiken Technical College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.9k).
